notableEvents.label: Brady House pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brady House singles on a line drive to left fielder Brandon Lockridge. Nasim Nuñez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jorbit Vivas GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jorbit Vivas grounds into a double play, pitcher Brian Fitzpatrick to shortstop Joey Ortiz to first baseman Jake Bauers. Brady House out at 2nd. Jorbit Vivas out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jorbit Vivas rally-killer GIDP
